content.problemStatement:
Vasya likes the number 239239239. Therefore, he considers a number pretty if its last digit is 222, 333 or 999.

Vasya wants to watch the numbers between LLL and RRR (both inclusive), so he asked you to determine how many pretty numbers are in this range. Can you help him?
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first and only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers LLL and RRR.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer — the number of pretty numbers between LLL and RRR.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: The pretty numbers between 111 and 101010 are 222, 333 and 999.
Example case 2: The pretty numbers between 111111 and 333333 are 121212, 131313, 191919, 222222, 232323, 292929, 323232 and 333333.
